description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, prominently featuring the X Games logo at multiple locations on its surface. The structure is constructed primarily from light and dark wood panels, with a smooth, continuous curved surface for skating and vertical walls at each end. Metal railings run along the top edges for safety, and a staircase with a platform is attached to one side, providing access to the upper deck. The ramp includes a central cutout or tunnel beneath the main skating surface, adding architectural interest and possible access or passage. The overall design is robust and professional, suitable for extreme sports events and public skate parks.
description: A large, professional wooden half-pipe skate ramp with X Games branding, metal safety railings, and an access staircase. The structure features smooth curved surfaces and a central tunnel beneath the ramp.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the half-pipe, the central tunnel, and the staircase with platform on the left.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curved skating surface, X Games logos, and the staircase leading to the upper platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ramp, the tunnel opening, and the full extent of the safety railings.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the main skating surface, both vertical ends, and the prominent X Games logos.
